pattern:fastapi+mongodb:crud.content: // FastAPI MongoDB: db=AsyncIOMotorClient(MONGODB_URI).myapp. @app.get('/books') async def list(): return [serialize(b) async for b in db.books.find()]. @app.post('/books',status_code=201) async def create(b:BookCreate): r=await db.books.insert_one(b.model_dump()); return {'id':str(r.inserted_id)}
